skill.name: SEO Audit
skill.description: This skill performs comprehensive search engine optimization audits of websites, analyzing on-page elements, technical SEO factors, and content quality to identify improvement opportunities.
skill.summary: Comprehensive website SEO analysis and improvement recommendations
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only skill that provides SEO audit guidance through natural language interactions. The static analyzer found no executable code, no suspicious patterns, and no risk factors. The skill operates purely as an informational tool that helps users understand SEO best practices and analyze their websites conceptually.

content.user_title: Audit Your Website for SEO Improvements
content.value_statement: Websites often struggle to rank well in search engines due to unknown technical issues and poor content optimization. This skill provides comprehensive SEO audits that identify on-page problems, technical weaknesses, and content opportunities to improve search visibility.
actual_capabilities: Analyze website URLs for on-page SEO factors like meta tags, heading structure, and content quality
Identify technical SEO issues including page speed concerns, crawlability problems, and indexation status
Evaluate content for keyword usage, readability scores, and topic depth
Provide actionable recommendations to improve search engine rankings
Explain SEO best practices for various page elements and content types
limitations: Cannot actually crawl live websites or fetch real-time data
Cannot access Google Search Console or analytics platforms directly
Cannot guarantee specific ranking improvements as search algorithms constantly change
Cannot replace comprehensive technical audits performed by specialized tools

use_cases.title: Analyze New Website Before Launch
use_cases.description: Run a pre-launch SEO audit on a new website to catch issues before going live
use_cases.target_user: Web developers and small business owners

use_cases.title: Improve Blog Post Visibility
use_cases.description: Get recommendations for optimizing existing blog content for better search rankings

use_cases.title: Identify Technical SEO Issues
use_cases.description: Understand technical factors that may be preventing a site from ranking well

prompt_templates.title: Basic SEO Audit Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Perform an SEO audit for my website at [URL]. Check the meta titles, descriptions, heading structure, and content quality. What issues do you see and what should I fix?
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner users who want a quick overview of their website's SEO health

prompt_templates.title: Technical SEO Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the technical SEO aspects of [URL]. Focus on page speed recommendations, mobile-friendliness, URL structure, internal linking, and any crawlability issues. What improvements would help?
prompt_templates.scenario: Users who want to understand technical factors affecting their rankings

prompt_templates.title: Content Optimization Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Review the content on page [URL] for SEO optimization. Check keyword usage, content depth, readability, and semantic relevance. Provide specific recommendations to improve ranking potential.
prompt_templates.scenario: Content writers and marketers optimizing specific pages

prompt_templates.title: Comprehensive SEO Strategy
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a complete SEO strategy for [URL]. Include on-page optimization, technical improvements, content roadmap, and keyword priorities. What are the most important actions to take first?
prompt_templates.scenario: Business owners planning long-term SEO efforts

output_examples.input: Perform an SEO audit for example.com/about
output: Meta Title: Present but could be more descriptive (current: 'About Us' - recommended: 'About Our Company - Learn Our Story and Mission')
Meta Description: Missing - add a compelling 155-character description with target keywords
Heading Structure: H1 is present but consider adding supporting H2 headings for better content organization
Content Quality: Good length (800+ words) but add more semantic variations of primary keywords
Internal Links: Add 2-3 links to relevant service pages
Image Alt Text: 2 images missing alt attributes - add descriptive alt text for accessibility and SEO

output_examples.input: What technical SEO issues might affect my site ranking?
output: Page Speed: Ensure images are optimized and compressed, enable browser caching, minify CSS and JavaScript files
Mobile Usability: Test with Google's Mobile-Friendly Tool and fix any usability issues
SSL Certificate: Confirm HTTPS is properly implemented and all resources load over HTTPS
XML Sitemap: Create and submit a comprehensive sitemap to Google Search Console
Structured Data: Add schema markup for business info, articles, or products to enhance search appearance

best_practices: Focus on one page or section at a time for detailed analysis rather than auditing entire sites superficially
Prioritize fixes based on impact - address title and meta issues first as they directly affect click-through rates
Document audit results and track improvements over time to measure SEO progress
anti_patterns: Do not expect immediate ranking improvements - SEO is a long-term strategy requiring consistent effort
Avoid keyword stuffing - focus on natural language and user intent rather than repeating keywords
Do not ignore technical issues - even perfect content will not rank well if the site has crawlability problems

faq.question: Can this skill guarantee first-page Google rankings?
faq.answer: No, no tool or service can guarantee specific search rankings as Google uses complex algorithms that constantly change. This skill provides recommendations based on best practices, but actual results depend on many factors including competition and content quality.

faq.question: How often should I run an SEO audit?
faq.answer: Run a comprehensive audit quarterly for established sites. Run audits more frequently when launching new pages, redesigning your site, or after major content changes. Regular audits help catch issues early.

faq.question: Does this skill work for all types of websites?
faq.answer: Yes, the audit recommendations apply to most websites including blogs, e-commerce sites, business websites, and web applications. However, highly specialized sites may need industry-specific SEO strategies beyond general best practices.

faq.question: Can this skill help with local SEO?
faq.answer: The skill covers general SEO principles including local ranking factors like NAP (Name, Address, Phone) consistency, Google Business Profile optimization, and local keyword targeting. For advanced local SEO, dedicated local SEO tools may be needed.

faq.question: What is the difference between on-page and technical SEO?
faq.answer: On-page SEO covers elements you control on your actual pages: content, meta tags, headings, images, and internal links. Technical SEO covers behind-the-scenes factors: site speed, mobile-friendliness, crawlability, security, and structured data.

faq.question: Do I need coding knowledge to implement SEO fixes?
faq.answer: Basic fixes like updating meta titles and descriptions require no coding. Technical fixes like implementing schema markup or optimizing site speed may require developer assistance. Many SEO improvements can be done through content management systems like WordPress.
